comment:
Thank you, thank you for this video, my daughter has T1D, (for 16 years), this is the most comprehensive explanation of DKA I’ve ever read/seen. When she was younger, she went in to DKA after a weekend with her father and he didn’t care for her T1D needs. She came home very ill, and I immediately took met her endo. at the ER.😔 DKA is scary! And deadly.
And your explanation of the various types of insulin is excellent. Insulin pumps are getting better as far as closing the loop. For many years, I hacked her pump using open-source software (🙏) to communicate with CGM/Dexcom (Looping), giving her much better glucose control, now that she’s older and Omnipods closed -loop system is getting better, she is using that system. She no longer uses Humulog, Lumjeb works better for her.

I don’t mind your new whiteboard method, ignore the critics! Use what is best and easier for you! I’m very grateful for your videos.🙏💕🌟🌟🌟
